alarm.title: Alarm radar
alarm.description: Live precipitation radar and active weather warnings for your location.
alarm.noAlerts: No severe weather alerts right now. Stay safe!
alarm.disclaimer: Alerts are derived from current forecast conditions. For official warnings, consult your local meteorological agency.

thunderstorm.title: Thunderstorm warning
thunderstorm.detail: Lightning and heavy downpours expected. Avoid open areas.

heavyRain.title: Heavy rain warning
heavyRain.detail: Risk of flooding and poor visibility. Drive with care.

heavySnow.title: Heavy snow warning
heavySnow.detail: Snowfall may disrupt travel and reduce visibility.

galeWind.title: Gale-force wind warning
galeWind.detail: Sustained winds near {{speed}} km/h. Secure loose objects.

strongWind.title: Strong wind advisory
strongWind.detail: Winds around {{speed}} km/h expected. Take care outdoors.

extremeHeat.title: Extreme heat warning
extremeHeat.detail: Highs near {{temp}}°. Stay hydrated and avoid sun exposure.

extremeCold.title: Extreme cold warning
extremeCold.detail: Lows near {{temp}}°. Risk of frostbite — dress warmly.

map.title: Weather map
map.description: Tap any spot on the world map to load its forecast.
map.hint: Tap anywhere on the map to see the weather for that spot.

offline.title: Offline mode
offline.connect: Connect to the internet to load weather.

toasts.offlineNoData: You're offline and no saved data exists
toasts.enableLocation: Please enable location in your browser settings
